official_name: Association for the Advancement of Medical Instrumentation
notes: US medical-device industry association. Publishes AAMI TIR (Technical Information Report) and ANSI/AAMI standards covering medical-device cybersecurity (e.g., TIR57, TIR97), risk management, and quality systems. Paid.
